message: Hi B1, my cost is 67. What's your valuation? Let's agree on a fair price above 67 to trade every round and maximize our payoffs.
My valuation is 88. Let’s trade at 77—fair split of surplus (11 for me, 10 for you).
Great first trade! With your val 88 and my cost 67, 77 is fair. Let's agree to submit 77 each round for consistent trades and max payoffs.
Agreed—77 works. Let’s lock this in for all rounds to ensure reliable trades and steady payoffs.
Perfect! 77 is locked in. Let’s keep bids/asks at 77 every round—no surprises, just steady 11 payoffs for both. Reliability beats risk!
